calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

Shanshan Zou, Esq. and Svetlana Rishina, Esq. for Plaintiff: California Bank & Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness Nandy E. Cortez was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendants John Evans, Steven M. Evans and Emmmanuel C. Denchuwu.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $51,899.65
Prejudgment interest - $5,495.52
Total - $57,395.17
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Set For Trial On May-23-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Continued To Jan-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Continued To Dec-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Leave To Defend The Action
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS STEVEN M. EVANS AND JOHN EVANS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND LEAVE TO DEFEND THE ACTION.
